admin-policy-workbench.summary: Policy authoring, dry-runs, redacted browsing, intent queues, approval review, stale-intent handling, and UI parity with GraphQL/MCP.
admin-policy-workbench.title: Admin Policy Workbench

agent-taskboard.summary: A governed task and bead queue that demonstrates collections, schemas, entity CRUD, links, graph traversal, audit, optimistic concurrency, MCP-oriented task discovery, and the unified CLI.
agent-taskboard.title: Agent Taskboard

customer-identity-graph.summary: CRM, CDP, and MDM flows for contact merge, identity resolution, golden record survivorship, relationship traversal, and provenance.
customer-identity-graph.title: Customer Identity Graph

invoice-approval-guardrails.summary: A finance workflow covering AP/AR partial payment, state machines, policy envelopes, mutation intent preview/approval, rollback, and audit-safe trusted agent writes.
invoice-approval-guardrails.title: Invoice Approval Guardrails

schema-release-sync.summary: Schema evolution, secondary indexes, validation rules, CDC, markdown templates, git mirror output, and rollback preview.
schema-release-sync.title: Schema Release Sync

supply-chain-bom.summary: ERP-style bill-of-materials traversal, recursive graph queries, reachability checks, aggregation, and link metadata.
supply-chain-bom.title: Supply Chain BOM

tenant-control-plane.summary: Multi-tenant path routing, users, credentials, JWT grant bounds, revocation, deployment registration, and BYOC isolation.
tenant-control-plane.title: Tenant Control Plane
